# Claude Workshop

> Professional AI development training for engineering teams. Official Claude Ambassadors teaching the DRO (Delegate, Review, Own) framework to Fortune 100 and DAX 40 companies.

Claude Workshop provides in-house and offsite training programs that help engineering teams master AI-assisted development with Claude. We train teams to decide what to delegate to AI, what to review, and what to keep under human control.

- The DRO Framework splits development tasks into three categories: Delegate (hand off boilerplate, tests, docs to AI), Review (AI proposes changes to bug fixes and refactoring, you decide), Own (architecture, security, and business logic stay human)
- Training is delivered on-site at client locations or as premium offsite programs
- Programs range from 1-day foundation workshops to multi-week enterprise transformations

## Training programs

- [Training overview](https://claudeworkshop.com/training): All available training formats and pricing
- [Foundation](https://claudeworkshop.com/training/foundation): 1-day introduction to AI-assisted development
- [Professional](https://claudeworkshop.com/training/professional): Advanced workflows and team integration
- [Enterprise](https://claudeworkshop.com/training/enterprise): Organization-wide AI transformation
- [Extensive program](https://claudeworkshop.com/training/extensive): Deep multi-day immersion
- [Medium program](https://claudeworkshop.com/training/medium): Focused 2-day workshop
- [Small program](https://claudeworkshop.com/training/small): Compact team session

## Methodology

- [DRO Framework](https://claudeworkshop.com/methodology): The Delegate, Review, Own framework applied across Plan, Design, Build, Test, Deploy, and Maintain phases

## Research

- [Claude 2.4: Subagents, Skills, and What They Mean for Your Workflow](https://claudeworkshop.com/research/claude-2-4-subagents-skills): How subagents, skills, and image generation fit into structured AI development
- [Claude Gas Town: Multi-Agent Orchestration for Claude CLI](https://claudeworkshop.com/research/claude-gastown-multi-agent-orchestration): A Claude CLI implementation of multi-agent orchestration with persistent work tracking
- [Gas Town: Steve Yegge's Multi-Agent Orchestrator](https://claudeworkshop.com/research/gas-town-multi-agent-orchestration): How running 20-30 Claude Code agents in parallel changes AI-assisted development
- [Designing Codebases for AI Agents](https://claudeworkshop.com/research/designing-codebases-for-ai-agents): How to structure code so AI agents like Claude and Claude Code work efficiently
- [Job vs Gym: Which Skills Should You Protect from AI?](https://claudeworkshop.com/research/job-vs-gym-ai-skills-framework): A framework for deciding when to use AI and when to maintain skills yourself
- [Why Senior Engineers Accept More AI Suggestions Than Juniors](https://claudeworkshop.com/research/senior-vs-junior-ai-acceptance-rates): Research showing AI coding tools amplify existing engineering skill
- [How Y Combinator Founders Ship with AI Coding Tools](https://claudeworkshop.com/research/yc-founders-ai-coding-patterns): Patterns from YC founders on using AI tools effectively
